phrases.text_local: Je vais prendre une poutine classique, s'il vous plaît.
phrases.pronunciation: zhuh veh PRAHN-druh OON poo-TEEN klah-SEEK seel voo PLEH
phrases.cultural_note: La Banquise offers over 30 types of poutine and is open 24 hours. The classic is frites, fromage en grains, and sauce brune.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what the difference is between their poutines
phrases.text_local: C'est quoi la différence entre les différentes poutines ?
phrases.pronunciation: say KWAH lah dee-fay-RAHSS ahntR lay dee-fay-RAHNT poo-TEEN
phrases.cultural_note: Poutine variations add toppings like smoked meat, mushrooms, or guacamole. Staff are poutine experts and love explaining the options.

responses.english: The classic has fries, cheese and gravy. The others have toppings.
responses.phonetic: lah klah-SEEK ah FREET froh-MAHZH ay SOHSS lay ZOH-truh ohn day gar-nee-TOOR
responses.local: La classique a frites, fromage et sauce. Les autres ont des garnitures.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the cheese curds are fresh
phrases.text_local: Le fromage en grains, il est frais du jour ?
phrases.pronunciation: luh fro-MAHZH ahn GRAHN eel ay FREH doo ZHOOR
phrases.cultural_note: Fresh cheese curds (fromage en grains) squeak against your teeth — a sign of freshness. Quality poutine spots source them daily.

responses.english: Yes, they were made this morning.
responses.phonetic: wee eel sohn fay suh mah-TAHN
responses.local: Oui, ils sont faits ce matin.

phrases.text_local: Est-ce que je peux avoir plus de sauce ?
phrases.pronunciation: ess-KUH zhuh puh ah-VWAHR ploo duh SOSS
phrases.cultural_note: The sauce in poutine is a light brown gravy — not too thick. Asking for extra is completely normal and welcomed.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for a vegetarian poutine option
phrases.cultural_note: Many poutineries now offer vegetarian or vegan gravy options. La Banquise has several veggie-friendly poutine variations on their menu.

responses.english: Yes, we have a vegetarian poutine.
responses.phonetic: wee ohn ah oon poo-TEEN vay-zhay-tah-RYEN
responses.local: Oui, on a une poutine végétarienne.
